# Business brief — mini-agent

## Scope

mini-agent is a tiny tea-shop assistant used as the reference fixture for
SC-019 (small-project wall-clock under 5 min). It knows about exactly one
entity type: products in a catalog of 20 items.

## Vocabulary

- product — a catalog item (mug, teapot, sampler, etc.)

## Non-goals

- no cart, no checkout, no customers.
